notes: "Zero dependencies" overstated it. The precise, true claims — now stated as such everywhere: the SHIPPED SERVER has zero RUNTIME npm dependencies (it runs on the Node standard library alone), and the charting engine is original code with no third-party charting library. Development and CI use ordinary tooling (esbuild, TypeScript, Playwright), the application requires Node itself, and market data comes from external providers under their own terms — none of which the old phrasing acknowledged. Docs-only; no code change.
